title: Preparation of Cas9 Protein
author: Ashwin Banfal
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rczd2x6

steps.title: Pick 6 colonies to add to...
steps.instruction: Pick 6 colonies to add to 20 ml LB + Amp (Cf=100 ug/ml) starter culture. undetermined, LB + Amp (Cf=100 ug/mL) starter culture

steps.title: Mix 1 µl of 10 ng/uL...
steps.instruction: Mix 1 µl of 10 ng/uL DNA + 10 µl Rosetta 2 cells (pRAR-rare codons). undetermined, 10 ng/uL DNA undetermined, Rosetta 2 cells

steps.title: Recover
steps.instruction: Recover: Add 300 µl LB, 50’ 37°C on shaker. undetermined, LB Undetermined, Shaker 00:50:00, Shaker

steps.title: Spin down (6000 xg, 1’), and remove 150 µl LB
steps.instruction: Spin down (6000 xg, 1’), and remove 150 µl LB. 00:01:00, Spin down

steps.title: Plate 100 µl, 30 µl on 2 AMP plates
steps.instruction: Plate 100 µl, 30 µl on 2 AMP plates.

steps.title: Grow overnight
steps.instruction: Grow overnight.

steps.title: Next day
steps.instruction: Next day: Store XL1 blue 20% glycerol stocks in -80°C. Undetermined, Storage

steps.title: Add AMP to the flasks (Cf=100 ug/ml)
steps.instruction: Add AMP to the flasks (Cf=100 ug/ml).

steps.title: Thaw cells in water
steps.instruction: Thaw cells in water.

steps.title: Add 20 ml starter culture in...
steps.instruction: Add 20 ml starter culture in the morning, undetermined, starter culture

steps.title: Grow to OD600=0
steps.instruction: Grow to OD600=0.6 (150 rpm, ~4 hrs, 37°C). Undetermined, Growing 04:00:00, Growing

steps.title: Set shaker temp to 16°C
steps.instruction: Set shaker temp to 16°C. Undetermined, Shaker temperature

steps.title: *Save 1 ml for SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: *Save 1 ml for SDS-PAGE: uninduced .

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 mM IPTG.

steps.title: Grow overnight (150 rpm, at least 16 hrs, 16°C)
steps.instruction: Grow overnight (150 rpm, at least 16 hrs, 16°C). Undetermined, Growing 16:00:00, Growing

steps.title: Harvest cells before lunch
steps.instruction: Harvest cells before lunch: Spin down (4000 rpm, 20’, 4°C). Undetermined, Spin down 00:20:00, Spin down *Keep the cells cold from here.

steps.title: Completely resuspend pellets in 20 ml...
steps.instruction: Completely resuspend pellets in 20 ml Lysis Buffer + 1mM PMSF per bottle. undetermined, Lysis Buffer + 1mM PMSF

steps.title: Use additional 20 ml Lysis Buffer to wash all bottles
steps.instruction: Use additional 20 ml Lysis Buffer to wash all bottles. undetermined, Lysis Buffer

steps.title: Transfer to 50 ml-tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer to 50 ml-tubes.

steps.title: *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE: cell pellet

steps.title: Freeze the cells at -80°C
steps.instruction: Freeze the cells at -80°C. Undetermined, Freezing cells

steps.title: Filter sample. HisTrap CV=5ml, FR=2ml/minBuffer A
steps.instruction: Filter sample. HisTrap CV=5ml, FR=2ml/minBuffer A: Lysis buffer, Buffer B: Elution buffer

steps.title: Push beaker with a stir bar...
steps.instruction: Push beaker with a stir bar to the bottom of ice bucket.

steps.title: Add ~50 ml Lysis Buffer and...
steps.instruction: Add ~50 ml Lysis Buffer and 1 protease inhibitor tablet/50 ml cell. Dissolve the tablets. undetermined, Lysis Buffer

steps.title: Transfer the cells to the beaker
steps.instruction: Transfer the cells to the beaker.

steps.title: Sonicate while stirring
steps.instruction: Sonicate while stirring: 8’ total, 10” on, 10” off, level 4. Lysate should turn fluid and thin. Repeat 8 min cycle, if necessary. 00:08:00, total 00:00:10, on/off

steps.title: Transfer to Oak Ridge tubes (30 ml/tube)
steps.instruction: Transfer to Oak Ridge tubes (30 ml/tube). *Balance within +/- 0.01g.

steps.title: Pellet cell debris (18,000 rpm, 30’, 4°C)
steps.instruction: Pellet cell debris (18,000 rpm, 30’, 4°C). Prepare HisTrap purification. HisTrap CV=5mL, FR=2mL/min Buffer A: Lysis buffer, Buffer B: Elution buffer Undetermined, Pellet cell debris 00:30:00, Pellet cell debris

steps.title: *Save 20 µl supernatant for SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: *Save 20 µl supernatant for SDS-PAGE: cell lysate

steps.title: Turn on UV lamp
steps.instruction: Turn on UV lamp.

steps.title: Wash Akta with water
steps.instruction: Wash Akta with water: pump wash, and flow 50% A, 50% B.

steps.title: Flow 50% A, 50% B
steps.instruction: Flow 50% A, 50% B.

steps.title: Flow 100% A, until steady baseline
steps.instruction: Flow 100% A, until steady baseline. Set baseline to zero.

steps.title: Fill tubing with water, connect column
steps.instruction: Fill tubing with water, connect column.

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: 5CV water.

steps.title: Equilibrate
steps.instruction: Equilibrate: 5CV lysis buffer.

steps.title: Apply sample to the column. Collect flow-through
steps.instruction: Apply sample to the column. Collect flow-through: Ni-sample loading. Re-apply flow-through to the column, if necessary.

steps.title: Purification
steps.instruction: Purification: In the cold room: First wash: 15CV lysis buffer. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash1. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash1 . *Save 20µl for SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Wash2
steps.instruction: Wash2: 3CV lysis buffer + 0.1% Triton X. Collect flow-through: Ni-wash2 . *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Purification using Akta
steps.instruction: Purification using Akta: First, attach column to Akta (FR=0.9 ml/min).

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: 5CV lysis buffer, until steady UV baseline.

steps.title: Elute
steps.instruction: Elute: 25CV elution buffer, 100% gradient.

steps.title: Collect fractions (Fraction size=2
steps.instruction: Collect fractions (Fraction size=2.5 ml).

steps.title: Clean-up
steps.instruction: Clean-up: 1. Wash: 5CV water 2. Store: 5CV 20% ethanol 3. Detach column. 4. Wash Akta with water.

steps.title: Pool appropriate fractions
steps.instruction: Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes with elution buffer. *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: Ni-elution

steps.title: Concentrate with 30K Amicon to ~3 ml volume
steps.instruction: Concentrate with 30K Amicon to ~3 ml volume. Collect flow-though: Ni-Amicon FT.

steps.title: Add ~1
steps.instruction: Add ~1.25 mg TEV/3 ml sample, and mix with pipet. undetermined, TEV

steps.title: Incubate on shaker, at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate on shaker, at 4°C overnight. Undetermined, Incubation on shaker 16:00:00, overnight incubation

steps.title: Next day
steps.instruction: Next day: *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: postTEV

steps.title: Add 25 ml of buffer A to sample
steps.instruction: Add 25 ml of buffer A to sample. undetermined, Buffer A

steps.title: Heparin CV=5 mL, FR=1 mL/min Buffer A
steps.instruction: Heparin CV=5 mL, FR=1 mL/min Buffer A: IEX low salt buffer, Buffer B: IEX high salt buffer

steps.title: Set-up Akta (FR=2 ml/min)
steps.instruction: Set-up Akta (FR=2 ml/min).

steps.title: Apply sample with pump, in the cold room
steps.instruction: Apply sample with pump, in the cold room: 1. Equilibrate: 10CV buffer A. 2. Apply sample to the column. Collect flow-through: Hep-sample loading.

steps.title: Attach column to Akta (FR=0
steps.instruction: Attach column to Akta (FR=0.9 ml/min).

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: 15CV buffer A, until steady baseline.

steps.title: Collect flow-through
steps.instruction: Collect flow-through: Hep-wash . *Save 20 µl for SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Elute
steps.instruction: Elute: 20CV buffer B, 100% gradient.

steps.title: Collect fractions (Fraction size=2 ml)
steps.instruction: Collect fractions (Fraction size=2 ml).

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: buffer B, until steady conductivity baseline for over 30 ml.

steps.title: Store
steps.instruction: Store: 5CV 20% ethanol.

steps.title: Wash Akta with water
steps.instruction: Wash Akta with water.

steps.title: Pool appropriate fractions
steps.instruction: Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes with buffer B. *Save 10 µl for SDS-PAGE: Hep-elution

steps.title: Concentrate sample to ~1 ml. Collect flow-through
steps.instruction: Concentrate sample to ~1 ml. Collect flow-through: Hep-Amicon FT.

steps.title: Leave concentrator on ice, at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Leave concentrator on ice, at 4°C overnight. Undetermined, Concentrator on ice

steps.title: MBPTrap/Superdex 200 CV=120 mL, FR=0.5-1 mL/min Buffer A
steps.instruction: MBPTrap/Superdex 200 CV=120 mL, FR=0.5-1 mL/min Buffer A: Gel filtration buffer Previous day: 1. Set-up Akta (FR=2 mL/min):2. Prepare columns:a. MBPTrap wash: 5CV water, 5CV gel filtration buffer (FR=2 mL/min), in the cold room.b. Attach MBPTrap and Superdex200 to Akta.c. Equilibrate overnight: 2CV gel filtration buffer (FR=0.3 mL/min).*Set end timer volume=240 mL, max pressure alarm=0.25 MPa.

steps.title: Concentrate sample to ~500 µl
steps.instruction: Concentrate sample to ~500 µl. Rinse concentrator with 500 µl gel filtration buffer. undetermined, Gel filtration buffer

steps.title: Spin down sample (11000 rpm, 4’, 4°C)
steps.instruction: Spin down sample (11000 rpm, 4’, 4°C). Transfer supernatant to a new 1.5 ml-tube. Undetermined, Spin down 00:04:00, Spin down

steps.title: To inject sample, first, clean injection...
steps.instruction: To inject sample, first, clean injection port, sample loop with water, gel filtration buffer.

steps.title: Now, draw up sample with 1...
steps.instruction: Now, draw up sample with 1 ml-syringe, and replace the syringe on the injection port.

steps.title: [LOAD] Inject sample to the loop with syringe
steps.instruction: [LOAD] Inject sample to the loop with syringe.

steps.title: Purification 1
steps.instruction: Purification 1. [INJECT] Apply sample to the column (~3 ml). 2. [LOAD] Flow ~1CV gel filtration buffer. Cas9 elutes at 65-85 ml. 3. Collect fractions (Fraction size=2 ml).

steps.title: Wash MBPTrap
steps.instruction: Wash MBPTrap: 10CV 10mM maltose + gel filtration buffer, in the cold room.

steps.title: Store MBPTrap
steps.instruction: Store MBPTrap: 5CV 20% ethanol.

steps.title: 2CV water (Long-term storage in 20% ethanol)
steps.instruction: 2CV water (Long-term storage in 20% ethanol).

steps.title: Detach Superdex200
steps.instruction: Detach Superdex200.

steps.title: Wash Akta with water
steps.instruction: Wash Akta with water.

steps.title: Pool appropriate fractions
steps.instruction: Pool appropriate fractions. Rinse collection tubes. *Save 5 µl for SDS-PAGE: Cas9

steps.title: Concentrate to desired concentration (~40 uM)
steps.instruction: Concentrate to desired concentration (~40 uM). %s %s

steps.title: Aliquot 20 µl each into 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 20 µl each into 1.5 ml-tubes.

steps.title: Snap-freeze in LN2, and store at -80°C
steps.instruction: Snap-freeze in LN2, and store at -80°C. Undetermined, Storage
